section.title: DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUtils Class Reference

para.para: Utility functions that deal with available Modules.

listitem.para: Called via Reflection by DOTweenComponent on Awake.

section.title: Detailed Description
section.para: Utility functions that deal with available Modules.

Modules defines:
DOTAUDIO
DOTPHYSICS
DOTPHYSICS2D
DOTSPRITE
DOTUI Extra defines set and used for implementation of external assets:
DOTWEEN_TMP ► TextMesh Pro
DOTWEEN_TK2D ► 2D Toolkit
